model: TR-33 / TR-35 / TR-50 / TR-75 / TR-33WT / TR-35WT / TR-50WT / TR-70WT
variant: 33,000 to 75,000 lb capacity four-post lifts including wide track (WT) variants

dimensions.column_material: 6 inch x 1 inch thick forklift mast sections
dimensions.wt_note: Wide Track models have wider overall width for wider vehicles

installation_requirements.alternative_footings: Four footings 6 ft x 6 ft x 12 in deep

specifications.lifting_mechanism: 4 direct drive cylinders at each post
specifications.column_material: 6 inch x 1 inch thick forklift mast sections

features: 33,000 to 75,000 lb capacities (standard and wide track)
Wide Track (WT) variants for wider vehicles like winged snow plows
Three parallel 12-inch wide-flange I-beam runway construction
6 inch x 1 inch thick forklift mast columns
All-position safety locks every 6 inches to full height
Runways adjustable for any vehicle wheelbase
Can set runways off center for wider equipment
Alignment compatible at any working height
Can be wider cross-rails or heavier capacities on request

optional_equipment.description: Raise tires off tracks for wheel, brake, and axle service

certifications: Manufactured in compliance with ALI, ANSI, ASME, AISI, ASTM, ASA, NEC, AWG, NEMA
safety_features: Multi-position mechanical locks in all four posts
notes: Combined manual covering 8 models (4 standard + 4 wide track)
WT = Wide Track for wider vehicles (snow plows, loaders, etc.)
TR-70WT is the wide track equivalent capacity near TR-75
Services full spectrum: passenger cars to heavy equipment
